rules.label: No signal
rules.text: No entry/exit logic; pure static allocation

name: TQQQ/SOXL/TECL Basket IBS Extreme + ATR Stop

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: TQQQ IBS = (close−low)/(high−low) < 0.1: equal-weight 33% TQQQ + 33% SOXL + 33% TECL

rules.label: Stop loss
rules.text: TQQQ close < entry price − 3 × ATR(14, Wilder): liquidate basket

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal & ATR: TQQQ. Execution: TQQQ / SOXL / TECL

rules.label: Signal
rules.text: Count n = # of RSI(2, Wilder) thresholds breached: <20, <25, <30

rules.label: Position
rules.text: Total weight = n / 3 split equally across TQQQ / SOXL / TECL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / SOXL / TECL

name: TQQQ Expanding Range Breakout + ATR Trailing Stop

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: All three must hold: QQQ above SMA(200), yesterday's range wider than the day before, ADX(10) > 25 → 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Trailing stop
rules.text: Stop = Price − 3 × ATR(14, Wilder); only ratchets up

name: TQQQ Dynamic Sizing: SMA200 + RSI Tiers

rules.label: Default
rules.text: 50% TQQQ when in regime with no RSI signal

rules.label: Pyramid
rules.text: Each 5% gain above entry → +15% allocation, capped at 100%

rules.label: Position
rules.text: n/5 TQQQ where n = # of SMA(20,50,100,150,200) that QQQ price exceeds

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Partial or full exit as SMAs are lost on the way down

rules.label: Signal
rules.text: Count n = # of Donchian midlines (50d, 100d, 150d, 200d) that QQQ price exceeds

rules.label: Signal 1
rules.text: ROC(20) > 0: today close > close 20 days ago

rules.label: Signal 2
rules.text: UpDay(20): >10 of last 20 day-to-day changes are positive

rules.label: Signal 3
rules.text: TII(20): >10 of last 20 closes are above SMA(20)

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: QQQ > SMA(200) AND stretch = (price - SMA)/SMA < 5% → 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: EMA(50) of QQQ > EMA(200) of QQQ → 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Trailing stop
rules.text: Stop = TQQQ price − 3 × ATR(14, Wilder); only ratchets up

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ close > median of last 200 daily closes

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: Avg daily range (last 25 days) > 110% of avg daily range (last 200 days)

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: One condition true → 50% TQQQ / 50% cash; neither true → 100% cash

rules.label: Components
rules.text: LeveragedRebalance, IBSATRStop, RSIThreeVote, ExpandingBreakout, TQQQDynamic, TQQQSMA150, AntiMartingale, SMAFiveVote, DonchianFourVote, ThreeVote, TrendStretchExit, GoldenCrossATR, RangeExpanded, MFI14Hyst (14 sub-algos)

rules.label: Weighting
rules.text: Equal virtual equity split at start; aggregated proportionally each day, reset annually
